meta.title: Veilus — Anti-detect browser with built-in automation
meta.description: Free anti-detect browser with native performance. 5 profiles forever. Record actions to auto-generate scripts. Download now.

hero.subtitle: The only anti-detect browser with a fully integrated automation platform. Native engine — 3x faster, 80% less RAM.
hero.check1: Free 5 profiles forever — no credit card
hero.check2: Each profile has unique fingerprint — undetectable
hero.check3: Record actions → auto-generate scripts in 1 click

features.title: Everything you need,
features.subtitle: Anti-detect browser + Automation platform. Competitors need 2 tools, you only need Veilus.

items.title: Fingerprint Engine
items.desc: Create unique fingerprints for each profile with 20+ parameters — Canvas, WebGL, AudioContext, Client Hints. Engineered at the deepest level for maximum stealth.

items.title: Veilus Flow
items.desc: Press "Record", interact with the web, press "Stop" — Veilus auto-generates YAML + Playwright scripts. Supports 20+ action types.

items.title: Visual Canvas
items.desc: Drag and drop to create automation flows like flowcharts. Supports branching, looping, and reusable components. Fully low-code.

items.title: Veilus Sync
items.desc: Sync profiles via Git or Google Drive. Hierarchical end-to-end encryption — even we can't read your data.

items.title: Scheduling
items.desc: Schedule scripts to run hourly, daily, or weekly. Auto-detects missed runs and catches up. Smart resource monitoring.

items.title: AI Agent (BYOK)
items.desc: Use your own AI API key — GPT-4, Claude, Gemini. AI analyzes DOM, plans actions, and executes automatically.

howItWorks.title: Get started in
howItWorks.subtitle: From download to full automation in just minutes.

steps.title: Download & Create Profile
steps.desc: Download Veilus for free. Create a profile with unique fingerprint in 10 seconds. Each profile = a completely new identity.

steps.title: Record actions
steps.desc: Press "Record", browse the web normally — click, type, scroll. Veilus converts everything into an automation script.

steps.title: Automate & Scale
steps.desc: Run scripts across multiple profiles simultaneously. Schedule automation. Smart monitoring — Veilus handles the rest.

pricing.title: Simple,
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when ready. Save 40% with annual plan.

plans.name: Free
plans.desc: Get started now, no credit card

faq.title: Frequently
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.

items.a: Yes. Our fingerprint engine is engineered at the deepest level, not just changing user-agent or injecting JavaScript. Tested and verified on creepjs.com and iphey.com with "unique" results for each profile.

items.q: Is it really free? Do I need a credit card?
items.a: Truly free. 5 profiles forever, no time limit, no credit card required. You only need to upgrade when you want more profiles or automation features.

items.q: How is it different from Multilogin or GoLogin?
items.a: Veilus uses a native engine instead of Electron — 3x faster, 80% less RAM. Plus, Veilus includes a built-in automation platform (action recorder, visual canvas, AI agent) — competitors require separate tools.

items.q: Does it support Windows and Linux?
items.a: Currently Veilus supports macOS. Windows and Linux versions are in development, expected Q2 2026.
All data is stored locally on your machine. Veilus Sync uses hierarchical end-to-end encryption — even we cannot read your data.

items.q: Can I use my own proxies?
items.a: Yes. Veilus supports HTTP, HTTPS, SOCKS5 proxies. Each profile can have its own proxy configuration, including proxy rotation.

Press "Record" → interact with the web normally (click, type, scroll...) → press "Stop". Veilus auto-generates scripts in YAML and Playwright JavaScript formats. You can edit, add variables, then run across multiple profiles.

items.q: Does it use a lot of RAM?
items.a: Each profile uses only about 100MB RAM — 3-5x less than Electron-based anti-detect browsers. Veilus also has smart resource monitoring that auto-throttles when your system is under load.
